# P1.5 Authentication & Authorization Phase Branch

This governance marker establishes the long-lived `phase/p1.5-auth-authorization` branch.

- S00, S01, and S02 are merged into `main`.
- The next delivery slice is S03.
- S03 through S07 are committed directly to this phase branch.
- Temporary `fix/*` and `feat/*` branches must merge back into this phase branch.
- The phase Draft PR remains open until the P1.5 authentication and authorization scope is complete.

This file contains branch-governance metadata only and does not change application runtime behavior.
